title: Assorted Armaments
description: A Minecraft mod that adds more types of weapons
body:
The mod simply adds more types of weapons.
6 new types of weapons are introduced in the mod:
Claymore, Mace, Flail, Javelin, Pike, Rapier.
Each one has its unique mechanic, pros and cons. From Wooden to Netherite, they can be used throughout the game. Suitable for players who are fed up with vanilla weapons.
